scripts.echidna:lcc-backing-a: FOUNDRY_PROFILE=echidna FOUNDRY_OUT_DIR=out-echidna ECHIDNA_COMPILE=foundry yarn run echidna -- --file test/fuzz/LiquidityHubLCCBackingEchidnaTest.sol --contract LiquidityHubLCCBackingEchidnaTest
scripts.echidna:sig-backing-01: FOUNDRY_PROFILE=echidna FOUNDRY_OUT_DIR=out-echidna ECHIDNA_COMPILE=foundry yarn run echidna -- --file test/fuzz/VTSCommit01SigBackingEchidnaTest.sol --contract VTSCommit01SigBackingEchidnaTest --disable-slither
scripts.fuzz: yarn run echidna:lcc-backing-a && yarn run echidna:sig-backing-01
scripts.security: yarn run slither && yarn run mythril
